scene_title: Profeta apontando para código de IA
narrative_beat: O profeta hebraico reconhece na coluna de código digital o cumprimento exato do que ele escreveu séculos atrás — reconhecimento atônito atravessa os milênios

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

shot.depth_of_field: prophet figure and his hand sharp, data center background blurred

subject.primary: Hebrew prophet figure in ochre and crimson robes, beard weathered and long, arm extended pointing finger at vertical beam of golden light
subject.focal_point: the extended pointing hand and the golden light beam it points toward
subject.secondary: vertical beam of golden light containing cascading code symbols — Hebrew letters morphing into binary, Arabic numerals morphing into algorithms
props: ancient scroll tucked under non-pointing arm
vertical golden light beam with cascading code
floating orange embers around the light beam

environment.location: modern data center with server rack rows
environment.atmosphere: temporal collision — ancient meets ultra-modern, prophecy meets data

composition.rule: rule of thirds — prophet occupies left third, light beam occupies right third, Ken Burns slow zoom toward the pointing hand
composition.foreground: prophet figure in warm crimson and ochre tones
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white data center — rows of black server racks, LED indicator lights stripped of color, cool industrial ceiling

lighting.key_light: golden light beam itself providing warm illumination on prophet's face from the right
lighting.fill_light: cold desaturated fill from data center lighting barely reaching left side of prophet
lighting.rim_light: crimson rim outlining prophet's back and robes on far side
lighting.mood: astonished recognition — the prophet sees his own words made digital reality

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

mood.emotion: astonishment, vindication, and terror — the prophet's vision was literal

symbolism.primary: the prophet pointing at code represents the unbroken line from biblical prophecy to artificial intelligence
symbolism.secondary: Hebrew letters morphing into binary code in the light beam shows the ancient and digital are the same language

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
